scope.selection_note: Codex-only identity cleanup prep after identity186. Scope is project aliases only. This artifact prepares only high-confidence project duplicates from the current canonical JSONL and identity override state, with explicit caution for capital-program amendment traps, program/scope traps, phase/location mismatch, and existing target alias chains.
scope.write_limit: Only this review note was written. No identity overrides, LOG.md, manifest, submissions, canonical JSONL, DB, wiki, materialized outputs, or other files were intentionally edited.
scope.latest_checkpoint_context: data/post-ingest/codex-orchestration-2026-06-21.json reports identity186 applied/checkpointed with 470 remaining duplicate_global_identity issues and unexpected_relation_endpoint_shape=0.

deterministic_project_duplicate_scan.method: Local read-only scan over data/canonical/projects.jsonl using the project identity-key rules from packages/db/src/identity.ts, current data/identity-overrides/merges.json alias resolution, and data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json suppression.

candidate_limit.requested: up to 8 high-confidence project aliases if possible
candidate_limit.note: Only four pairs cleared semantic review. The remaining current project duplicate pairs were deferred rather than padding the batch with program, amendment, phase, location, or scope traps.

validator_evidence: Global project records project_b46-sbs-utica-ave-2015-09-10 and project_utica-ave-sbs-2014 share identity key project_b46-sbs.
Global project records project_b46-sbs-utica-ave-2015-09-10 and project_utica-ave-sbs-2014 share identity key project_utica-ave-sbs.

source_evidence.quote: Build on existing Bus Priority and Safety Project to upgrade B46 Limited to B46 SBS
The Utica Avenue B46 corridor was identified as a potential candidate for Select Bus Service

target.project_name: Utica Avenue B46 Select Bus Service

proposed_aliases.reason: Both records describe the same B46/Utica Avenue SBS project in Brooklyn, with matching B46 SBS and Utica Avenue SBS identity keys, compatible SBS project type, and overlapping source-backed descriptions of upgrading B46 Limited to B46 SBS. The direction keeps the richer 2015-2016 implementation cluster as canonical while folding the 2014 planning cluster into it.

guards.alias_merge_target_trap_reason: The alias is already a small 2014 planning cluster target. Adding alias -> target creates an allowed acyclic alias chain that collapses two same-project B46/Utica SBS clusters; current override validation permits non-cyclic chains and identityOverrideTarget resolves through them.

validator_evidence: Global project records project_bx6-sbs-brt-bx6-cb12-may2022 and project_bx6-south-bronx-crosstown-sbs share identity key project_bx6-sbs.

source_evidence.quote: Bx6 Select Bus Service Project Update
Bx6 South Bronx Crosstown Select Bus Service
Identified as SBS candidate in Bus Rapid Transit Phase II study

target.display_name: Bx6 South Bronx Crosstown Select Bus Service
target.project_name: Bx6 South Bronx Crosstown Select Bus Service

proposed_aliases.reason: The 2022 record is source-labeled as a Bx6 Select Bus Service Project Update and references the September 3, 2017 launch. The target is the richer planning/launch Bx6 South Bronx Crosstown SBS cluster for the same Bx6 SBS corridor. This is treated as a same-project update, not a separate capital-program phase identity.

guards.alias_merge_target_trap_reason: The alias is already the target for two small Bx6 update/name variants. Adding alias -> target creates an allowed acyclic chain into the richer Bx6 South Bronx Crosstown SBS record and does not cross route, borough, or corridor identity.

validator_evidence: Global project records project_faster-cleaner-safer-plan and project_meeting-doc-113946-faster-cleaner-safer share identity key project_faster-cleaner-safer-plan.

source_evidence.quote: multiple successful initiatives that have been underway, including the Faster, Cleaner, Safer plan
implementing the Faster, Cleaner and Safer Strategic Action Plan
Plan to improve service delivery and increase customer satisfaction

target.display_name: Faster, Cleaner and Safer Strategic Action Plan
target.project_name: Faster, Cleaner and Safer Strategic Action Plan

proposed_aliases.reason: Both records name the same Faster, Cleaner, Safer plan/strategic action plan. The target preserves the fuller formal title while the alias is a shorter meeting-document extraction with compatible planning/report family and ongoing/active status.

guards.alias_merge_target_trap_reason: The alias is a one-target mini-cluster for shorter Faster Cleaner Safer initiative wording. Adding alias -> target creates an allowed acyclic chain into the formal Strategic Action Plan record.

validator_evidence: Global project records project_vn-x4-operational-improvements-safety-fence and project_vn-x4-safety-fence share identity key project_vn-x4-vn-operational-improvements-safety-fence.

source_evidence.quote: VN-X4 D806VNX1 VN - Operational Improvements (Safety Fence)
Installation of the Safety Fence on the Upper and Lower Roadways at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge
Project VN-X4- Installation of Safety Fence

proposed_aliases.reason: Both records identify the same VN-X4 safety fence work at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge. The target is the richer design-build/award cluster, while the alias is a later commitment/budget view of the same VN-X4 operational improvements safety-fence project.

guards.alias_merge_target_trap_reason: The alias is already a one-alias commitment cluster for the same VN-X4 VNB safety fence project. Adding alias -> target creates an allowed acyclic chain into the richer design-build record.

deferred.reason: Deferred for location/scope mismatch: Woodhaven Boulevard Queens SIP versus 79th Street Manhattan/M79 SBS context. The shared key appears contaminated by broad 2017 Street Improvement Project wording.
Deferred for location mismatch: Woodhaven Boulevard Queens versus 79th Street Manhattan. Same-year/generic SIP wording is not enough for project identity.
Deferred for program-vs-expansion scope trap: ABLE expansion is not automatically identical to the broader operational ABLE program.
Deferred for project-vs-contract-modification trap: TransCore contract modification may be an implementing contract/action under CBDTP, not the whole program identity.
Deferred for program-vs-support-projects trap: East Side Access support projects may be a related bundle rather than the same identity as East Side Access.
Deferred for scope/location narrowing: Fordham Road - Inwood/Bx12 corridor study spans Bronx/Manhattan, while the 2026 record is Sedgwick Avenue to Bronx River Parkway.
Deferred for phase trap: Phase 2 may be a subphase/action under the broader Jamaica Capacity Improvement Project.
Deferred for component/subproject trap: Hall Interlocking Expansion appears related to Jamaica capacity improvements but not automatically the same project identity.
Deferred for location mismatch: the larger Lexington Avenue 96th-60th Street project and the later 60th-52nd Street upgrade may be adjacent/related but need reviewer confirmation before merging.
Deferred for support-bundle versus specific construction project trap.
Deferred for phase/broader-program trap: Phase 1 replacement may be a phase of the broader Park Avenue Viaduct SOGR effort.
Deferred for capital-program amendment/design-services trap. Amendment 2 wording is not enough to merge the capital-program project and design-services record.
Deferred for same-name different operating-agency/scope trap: LIRR security initiatives and NYCT security initiatives are not safely identical.

inspections.command: rg -n "identity18[0-9]|batch18[0-9]|project aliases|do-not-merge|do_not_merge|merges" data/review_notes data/materialized data/canonical packages/harness/src/mta -g '!data/transcripts/**'
inspections.purpose: Located current identity prep context; missing historical paths were non-blocking.

inspections.command: jq guards over data/identity-overrides/merges.json and data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
inspections.purpose: Checked project alias count, existing project alias mappings, and project do-not-merge guards.

inspections.command: bun --eval '<local deterministic project duplicate scan over projects.jsonl, project identity-key logic, current merge alias resolution, and do-not-merge suppression>'
inspections.purpose: Produced the 23 current project duplicate_global_identity-style rows and 17 unique pairs used for selection/defer decisions.

inspections.command: bun --eval '<selected-pair guard script over projects.jsonl, merges.json, and do-not-merge.json>'
inspections.purpose: Verified presence, alias/target override status, existing merge-target chains, cycle risk, and raw/resolved do-not-merge status for all four prepared aliases.

inspections.command: rg selected ids across data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch*.json data/identity-overrides/merges.json data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
inspections.purpose: Confirmed selected records are not already aliases in merges.json, and identified prior notes that deferred these same semantic pairs because of existing merge-target chains.

conductor_apply_note: This prep artifact intentionally does not edit data/identity-overrides/merges.json or generated outputs. Re-run guards immediately before applying. All four proposals intentionally collapse existing acyclic project merge-target chains; if conductor policy disallows adding aliases whose ids are already merge targets, leave these deferred instead of partially applying.
